# awscc_storagegateway_tape_pool (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::StorageGateway::TapePool



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `pool_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom tape pool.
- `pool_id` (String) The unique identifier of the custom tape pool, extracted from the ARN.
- `pool_name` (String) The name of the custom tape pool.
- `retention_lock_time_in_days` (Number) Tape retention lock time in days (up to 36,500 days / 100 years).
- `retention_lock_type` (String) Tape retention lock type. Governance mode allows authorized removal; compliance mode prevents all removal.
- `storage_class` (String) The storage class associated with the custom pool (S3 Glacier or S3 Glacier Deep Archive).
- `tags` (Attributes List) A list of up to 50 tags for the tape pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The tag key.
- `value` (String) The tag value.
